---
title: "Diffusion Policy for Compliant Robots"
subtitle: "From Imitation Learning to Variable Admittance Control"
author: "Alessandro Leanza"
format:
  revealjs:
    theme: [simple, custom.scss]
    slide-number: false
    chalkboard: true
    include-after-body: scripts/reveal_footer.html
    incremental: false
    transition: slide
    navigation-mode: vertical
    width: 1600
    height: 900
    smaller: true
bibliography: references.bib
include-after-body: scripts/reveal_title_footer.html
html-math-method: mathml
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

{{< include sections/_01_motivation.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/_02_imitation_learning.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/_03_diffusion_models.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/_04_diffusion_policy.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/_05_inference_efficiency.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/_06_compliant_control.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/_07_dp_variable_admittance.qmd >}}

{{< include sections/_08_summary.qmd >}}
